description: MCP servers used by the agent framework. Credentials live in ~/.claude-agents/credentials.env. See README.md for setup.

atlassian.description: Jira and Confluence integration. OAuth — authenticates via browser on first use.
atlassian.setup: No credentials needed. First tool call opens an OAuth window.

bitbucket-extended.description: Bitbucket PR management, pipelines, and code review.
bitbucket-extended.auth_notes: Bitbucket API tokens use Basic auth with email:token. Set BITBUCKET_API_TOKEN and BITBUCKET_EMAIL in ~/.claude-agents/credentials.env. Falls back to BITBUCKET_USERNAME + BITBUCKET_APP_PASSWORD if no API token. The server reads ~/.claude-agents/credentials.env directly when env vars are not set.

env_required.BITBUCKET_EMAIL: Email used with the API token (Basic auth uses email:token)
env_required.BITBUCKET_APP_PASSWORD: Legacy app password (fallback if no API token)

playwright.description: Browser automation for UI testing. Required for /ui-test agent.

aws_bedrock.description: Optional: route Claude Code through AWS Bedrock instead of Anthropic's API.

env_required.ANTHROPIC_MODEL: Inference profile ARN for the model

aws_bedrock.notes: SSO credentials typically expire after 12 hours. Run 'aws sso login --profile <profile>' to refresh. Claude Code will call awsAuthRefresh automatically on expiry if configured.
